integration_validation_v2.gap: Required 'Manual' comparison strategy variant is MISSING from the enum (only PixelDiff + StructuralDom), and there are no diff 'result fields' (struct is request/config only). Proof is in-memory struct validation, no PG/EventLedger/ArtifactStore touch.
integration_validation_v2.evidence: src/kernel/visual_debugging_loop.rs:13-17 VisualComparisonMode { PixelDiff, StructuralDom } — no Manual variant; no DiffResult/result-field struct anywhere (grep for Manual/ComparisonStrategy/DiffResult finds none); tests/kernel_visual_debugging_loop_tests.rs only validates in-memory structs.

integration_validation_v3.evidence: Production src/kernel/visual_debugging_loop.rs:14-20 VisualComparisonMode{PixelDiff,StructuralDom,Manual} (required Manual variant added); :45-50 VisualDiffOutcome incl. ManualReviewRequired; :110-189 compute_visual_comparison computes real pixel/DOM diffs. Result fields VisualDiffComputationV1 persist via record_visual_diff_result (visual_diff_baseline.rs:477-542, SQL INSERT + same-tx RESULT_RECORDED event; mode-mismatch guard) + list API; table in migration 0124:91. Proof tests/atelier_visual_diff_result_tests.rs on managed PG: pixel-diff computed 300bp Fail persisted+re-read+EventLedger; structural-DOM within-limit pass; manual mode persists manual_review_required and rejects mode-mismatch/unknown-request writes.
integration_validation_v3.basis: v3 adversarial per-MT review of remediated deliverable + runtime proof via full-crate managed-PG sweep and kernel-builder fresh-DB proof logs
